name: Autumn Quinoa & Butter Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Cooked/canned butter beans (drained and rinsed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly rinse the quinoa by placing it in a large bowl and filling the bowl with cold water. Drain the quinoa and repeat the rinsing and draining four more times; set aside.
2. Melt the margarine in a 2-quart saucepan over medium-high heat. Add the onion and ginger, and cook, stirring until the onion is softened. Stir in the orange juice, water, honey, salt, coriander, cardamom, and nutmeg; bring to a boil.
3. Stir in the sweet potato and squash; bring to a boil. Cook, uncovered, for 7 minutes. Stir in the butter beans and quinoa, and return to a boil. Reduce the heat and simmer, covered, for 15 minutes.
4. Stir in the cranberries; simmer, covered, for an additional 5 minutes.
